name: Jim Breuer
bio: Jim Breuer is an American stand-up comedian and actor, a Saturday Night Live cast member from 1995 to 1998 where he played characters including Goat Boy and impersonated Joe Pesci. He co-starred in the 1998 film Half Baked and is known for a heavy-metal-themed live act featuring his impression of AC/DC singer Brian Johnson. His comedy draws on everyday life, marriage, and parenting.

timeline.ev: Co-stars in Half Baked; leaves SNL
Releases rock album Songs from the Garage

accolades: Named to Comedy Centrals 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time
